arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the FSx ONTAP file system.

automatic_backup_retention_days.description: The number of days to retain automatic backups.

daily_automatic_backup_start_time.description: The time of day when automatic backups are scheduled to start.

deployment_type.description: The type of deployment for the file system, such as MULTI_AZ or SINGLE_AZ.

disk_iops_configuration.description: The configuration for disk IOPS (Input/Output Operations Per Second), including IOPS value and mode.

dns_name.description: The DNS name of the file system.

endpoint_ip_address_range.description: The IP address range for the file system's endpoint.

endpoints.description: The endpoints for intercluster and management access, including DNS names and IP addresses.

ha_pairs.description: The number of high availability (HA) pairs configured for the file system.

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key used for encryption.

network_interface_ids.description: The IDs of the network interfaces associated with the file system.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the file system.

preferred_subnet_id.description: The ID of the preferred subnet for the file system.

route_table_ids.description: The IDs of the route tables associated with the file system.

storage_capacity.description: The storage capacity of the file system, measured in gigabytes.

storage_type.description: The type of storage used by the file system, such as SSD or HDD.

subnet_ids.description: The IDs of the subnets in which the file system is located.

tags.description: The tags associated with the file system.

throughput_capacity.description: The throughput capacity of the file system, measured in megabytes per second.

throughput_capacity_per_ha_pair.description: The throughput capacity per high availability (HA) pair, measured in megabytes per second.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC in which the file system is located.

weekly_maintenance_start_time.description: The start time for the weekly maintenance window.
